basics.name: Tomer Ashuach
basics.label: NLP Researcher
basics.summary: NLP Researcher at the Technion, supervised by Yonatan Belinkov, focusing on interpretability, knowledge and unlearning in Language Models

work.name: IBM Research
work.summary: Summer Internship developing an Agentic Workflow for extracting data privacy risks from Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) documents using LangGraph and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

work.name: Intel's Private Cloud
work.summary: Led the development and deployment of machine learning solutions to improve the quality and execution of Intel's private global computing cloud.
highlights: Developed run-time prediction model for real-time decision-making on incoming cloud jobs
Created time-series model for resource allocation predictions

work.name: RealSense, Intel
work.summary: Student position focused on development of new SDK features as well as bug fixing.

publications.name: REVS: Unlearning memorized sensitive information in Language Models
publications.summary: Developed REVS, an unlearning method addressing sensitive information memorization in Language Models as part of research on Mechanistic Interpretability.
